why: Three identified logging gaps leave the email pipeline partially blind. Reconcile recovery lacks per-email context; error-path lock-releases carry no error reason; label creation failures produce zero trace.
intended_outcome_statement: After this change: (1) each non-dry-run reconcile recovery emits an email_reconcile_recovery event with reason and age_hours, visible in the daily rollup; (2) error-path lock-released entries carry an error_reason field; (3) ensureLabelMap label creation failures emit a stderr warning. All fail-open guarantees are preserved.
